Composition.Programmer 1:
Fix and enhance the backend code in main.py for the 'GymMembership' web application.
- Ensure all routes correctly render the corresponding frontend templates.
- Verify that the backend supports all nine pages as specified  Dashboard, Membership Plans, Plan Details, Class Schedule, Trainer Profiles, Trainer Detail, PT Booking, Workout Records, and Log Workout.
- Fix the issue causing jinja2.exceptions.TemplateNotFound for 'dashboard.html' by coordinating with Programmer 2 to ensure the template file exists and is correctly named.
- Maintain all file read/write operations from the 'data' directory as plain text.
- Ensure the backend routing aligns with frontend navigation URLs.
Composition.Programmer 2:
Develop all frontend HTML template files for the 'GymMembership' web application.
- Create the missing 'dashboard.html' template with the required page title, elements, and IDs as specified in the requirements document.
- Develop the other eight frontend pages as HTML files  membership_plans.html, plan_details.html, class_schedule.html, trainer_profiles.html, trainer_detail.html, pt_booking.html, workout_records.html, log_workout.html.
- Ensure all pages have the specified page titles, UI elements (buttons, dropdowns, inputs, tables, grids), and element IDs.
- Implement navigation URLs using backend routes, not direct HTML file names.
- Ensure the Dashboard page is the starting page accessible at route '/'.
- Coordinate with Programmer 1 to confirm backend routes and template names match frontend navigation.

Composition.Programmer 1:
Test whether the website can be accessed through local port 5000. In this test, you only need to test whether the first page of the website can be accessed through the local 5000 port.
Task 2  Test whether the first page of the website loads correctly and whether basic navigation works based on the example data provided in the Task.
Task 3  Test the elements and integrity of all pages. This includes verifying the presence and correctness of all specified elements on each page as per the requirements

background_prompt: EvoMAC is a software company powered by multiple intelligent agents, such as chief executive officer, chief human resources officer, chief product officer, chief technology officer, etc, with a multi-agent organizational structure and the mission of 'changing the digital world through programming'.
